arts.ttl: Germany vs Netherlands: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Two great international rivals collide on Monday night as Germany take on the Netherlands at the Allianz Arena. However, a draw in Hungary on Thursday means they trail Germany in the group, and they could do with a victory in Munich to boost their chances of playing in next year's finals.

arts.ttl: Jonathan Tah to receive offers from Italy, England, Spain, and Germany next summer
arts.sum: Jonathan Tah will most likely receive offers from clubs in Italy, Spain, England, and Germany when his contract expires with Bayer Leverkusen next summer, according to Gazzetta dello Sport. The…

arts.ttl: Frenkie de Jong to Man Utd is BACK ON
arts.sum: In May, Ten Hag confirmed that he wanted to sign De Jong to play alongside Casemiro during his first transfer window as Man Utd boss. Furthermore, Casemiro continues to be linked with an exit and although Erik ten Hag could be sacked within the next few weeks, Man Utd remain interested in bringing De Jong to the club following years of admiration.

arts.ttl: Will Julian Nagelsmann remain as Germany head coach beyond the 2026 World Cup?
arts.sum: When Julian Nagelsmann took over the reins as head coach of the German national team ahead of Euro 2024, there was a general sense of disillusionment towards Die Nationalmannschaft. Having…

arts.ttl: Germany's 2014 World Cup winners set for 'emotional' farewell in Munich
arts.sum: The Bayern Munich pair and Real Madrid legend will be honoured along with Manchester City’s İlkay Gündoğan as a legendary quartet who retired from international football after Euro 2024. Along with Kroos, the duo wrote their names into footballing folklore in 2014 when they played their part in Germany’s World Cup victory, beating Argentina in the final in Brazil thanks to Mario Götze ’s legendary extra-time strike.
